mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notify_message_log (schedule_id, task_id, user_id, channel, request_id, message_title, message_body, send_status, error_code, error_message, sent_at, created_at) VALUES (#{scheduleId}, #{taskId}, #{userId}, #{channel}, #{requestId}, #{messageTitle}, #{messageBody}, #{sendStatus}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{sentAt}, NOW(3))
